name: CLOROX CO
sicDescription: Specialty Cleaning, Polishing and Sanitation Preparations

charity.s: $9M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.11% of revenue) via Clorox Company Foundation. Operates the Clorox Company Foundation: $4.6M in charitable contributions, gifts & grants paid (FY2024, IRS Form 990-PF).

environment.s: environmental violation: $518K in federal penalties (Violation Tracker).

dei.s: EEO-1 workforce demographics on federal record (FY2020, DOL OFCCP FOIA release): 6,344 US employees — 35.2% women, 38.3% racial/ethnic minorities; management 48.2% women, 32% minorities.

wiki.extract:
The Clorox Company (formerly Clorox Chemical Company) is an American multinational manufacturer and marketer of consumer and professional products.  Clorox ranked annually on the Fortune 500 list from 2000 to 2024, where it last held the #485 spot.
Clorox products are sold primarily through mass merchandisers, retail outlets, e-commerce channels, distributors, and medical supply providers. Clorox brands include its namesake bleach and cleaning products as well as Burt's Bees, Formula 409, Glad, Hidden Valley, Kingsford, Kitchen Bouquet, KC Masterpiece, Liquid-Plumr, Brita (in the Americas), Mi

sampleRecalls.title: Clorox® Recalls Pine-Sol® Scented Multi-Surface Cleaners, CloroxPro® Pine-Sol® All Purpose Cleaners, and Clorox® Professional™ Pine-Sol® Lemon Fresh Cleaners Due to Risk of Exposure to Bacteria

hazards: The recalled products may contain bacteria, including Pseudomonas aeruginosa, an environmental organism found widely in soil and water. People with weakened im…
products: Pine-Sol® Scented Multi-Surface Cleaners in Lavender Clean®, Sparkling Wave®, and Lemon Fresh scents, CloroxPro® Pine-S…
units: To date, testing has identified bacteria in certain recalled products, including those produced between January 2021 and September 2022. Clorox produced approximately 37 million recalled products in that period.

sampleRecalls.title: Three Types of Liquid Plumr Clog Removers Recalled by The Clorox Company Due to Failure to Meet Child-Resistant Closure Requirement
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves three Liquid Plumr clog removing products, sold in 17-ounce bottles that are about 9 inches tall. The bottles have the Liquid Plumr logo and the name of the product on the front. injuries: The Clorox Company has received 8 reports of the child-resistant bottle caps not working as intended and 221 reports of the bottles leaking. No injuries have been reported.
